name: Jezebel
description: Stout and muscular woman in her late thirties, dressed in the garb of an adventurer. She bought the Jaunty Horn with her adventuring earnings and now runs it as proprietor.
notes: Purchased the Jaunty Horn with adventuring loot.

Dreams of hunting a yellow bile wyrm south of Prigwort as her last great adventure — she's heard the story but never encountered the beast herself. A knight reportedly chased it off before anyone could engage it; neither have been seen since.
Keeps a bottle of nippers in stock for grimalkin guests.
Recognised Constable Wolder when the party arrived; he was visibly uncomfortable.
